style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow crimson beneath Bulbasaur's skin, emitting intense heat shimmer that distorts the air in rippling waves. Ember sparks float upward in lazy spirals, crackling with orange-white energy, while a vibrant crimson aura pulses around its body in concentric rings. The lighting casts a warm amber glow, illuminating the surroundings with flickering firelight that highlights the texture of its leaves. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
